scripts.fix:orphaned-booking-travelers: NODE_ENV=production node -e "const { sequelize } = require('./models'); async function fix() { try { const [orphanedRecords] = await sequelize.query('SELECT bt.id, bt.booking_id, bt.traveler_id FROM booking_travelers bt LEFT JOIN travelers t ON bt.traveler_id = t.id WHERE t.id IS NULL'); console.log('📊 Found', orphanedRecords.length, 'orphaned records'); if (orphanedRecords.length > 0) { await sequelize.query('DELETE bt FROM booking_travelers bt LEFT JOIN travelers t ON bt.traveler_id = t.id WHERE t.id IS NULL'); console.log('✅ Deleted orphaned records'); } try { await sequelize.query('ALTER TABLE booking_travelers ADD CONSTRAINT fk_booking_travelers_traveler_id FOREIGN KEY (traveler_id) REFERENCES travelers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE'); console.log('✅ Foreign key constraint added!'); } catch (e) { console.log('⚠️ Constraint already exists or failed:', e.message); } } catch (error) { console.error('❌ Error:', error.message); } finally { await sequelize.close(); } } fix();"
scripts.fix:database-and-create-payment-failed: npm run fix:all-orphaned-records && npm run create:payment-failed-table
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:roles && npm run seed:states && npm run seed:cities && npm run seed:admin && npm run seed:vendors && npm run seed:activities && npm run seed:badges && npm run seed:cancellationPolicies && npm run seed:destinations && npm run seed:exclusions && npm run seed:boardingPoints && npm run seed:inclusions && npm run seed:ratingCategories && npm run seed:trekCaptains && npm run seed:demoTrek && npm run seed:customer && npm run seed:travelers && npm run seed:bookings && npm run seed:ratingReviews
scripts.logs:test: node -e "const logger = require('./utils/logger'); logger.info('app', 'Test log entry', {test: true}); console.log('✅ Log test completed - check logs directory');"
scripts.migrate:cancellation-system: NODE_ENV=production npm run migrate:cancellation-policy && npm run migrate:policy-settings
scripts.setup:cancellation-policies: NODE_ENV=production node -e "const { sequelize } = require('./models'); async function setup() { try { console.log('🚀 Setting up cancellation policy system...'); await sequelize.query('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cancellation_policy_settings (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, policy_type ENUM(\"flexible\", \"standard\") NOT NULL, flexible_advance_non_refundable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, flexible_full_payment_24h_deduction INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 100, standard_72h_plus_deduction INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20, standard_48_72h_deduction INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 50, standard_24_48h_deduction INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 70, standard_under_24h_deduction INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 100, is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INDEX idx_policy_type (policy_type), INDEX idx_is_active (is_active)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci'); console.log('✅ Policy settings table created!'); await sequelize.query('INSERT IGNORE INTO cancellation_policy_settings (policy_type, flexible_advance_non_refundable, flexible_full_payment_24h_deduction, standard_72h_plus_deduction, standard_48_72h_deduction, standard_24_48h_deduction, standard_under_24h_deduction, is_active) VALUES (\"flexible\", TRUE, 100, 20, 50, 70, 100, TRUE), (\"standard\", TRUE, 100, 20, 50, 70, 100, TRUE)'); console.log('✅ Default policy settings inserted!'); console.log('🎉 Cancellation policy system setup complete!'); } catch (error) { console.error('❌ Error:', error.message); } finally { await sequelize.close(); } } setup();"
scripts.migrate:disputed-amount: NODE_ENV=production node -e "const { sequelize } = require('./models'); sequelize.query('ALTER TABLE issue_reports ADD COLUMN disputed_amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NULL COMMENT \"Amount disputed by the customer\"').then(() => { console.log('✅ disputed_amount column added successfully!'); sequelize.close(); }).catch(err => { console.error('❌ Error:', err.message); sequelize.close(); });"
scripts.cleanup:duplicate-indexes: NODE_ENV=production node -e "const { sequelize } = require('./models'); async function cleanup() { try { const [results] = await sequelize.query('SHOW INDEX FROM customers'); const indexesByColumn = {}; results.forEach(index => { if (!indexesByColumn[index.Column_name]) indexesByColumn[index.Column_name] = []; indexesByColumn[index.Column_name].push(index); }); const indexesToRemove = []; Object.entries(indexesByColumn).forEach(([column, indexes]) => { if (indexes.length > 1) { const duplicates = indexes.slice(1); duplicates.forEach(index => { if (!index.Key_name.includes('PRIMARY')) indexesToRemove.push(index.Key_name); }); } }); console.log('🗑️ Removing', indexesToRemove.length, 'duplicate indexes...'); for (const indexName of indexesToRemove) { try { await sequelize.query('DROP INDEX \`' + indexName + '\` ON customers'); console.log('✅ Removed:', indexName); } catch (error) { console.log('❌ Failed to remove', indexName + ':', error.message); } } const [finalResults] = await sequelize.query('SHOW INDEX FROM customers'); console.log('✅ Cleanup complete! Final index count:', finalResults.length + '/64'); } catch (error) { console.error('❌ Error:', error.message); } finally { await sequelize.close(); } } cleanup();"
